name: Disappearance
description: You shroud a creature from others' senses. The target becomes , but not merely to vision. The invisibility granted by disappearance applies to all precise senses an observer might have. It's still possible for a creature to find the target by Seeking using various senses, looking for disturbed dust, hearing gaps in the sound spectrum, or finding some other way to discover the presence of a creature that is otherwise undetectable.
